rulings.Case Title: NATALIE BUFORD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Court Approval Of Settlement As Being In Good Faith, And For Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Intervenors¿ motion for court approval of settlement as being in good faith, and for dismissal is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Airgas-Northern California & Nevada, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Mr. Breckler¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing gloves and blankets) attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Breckler¿s declaration are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Scott Co. of California¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Breckler was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Mr. Breckler¿s deposition testimony precludes defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant S&S Welding, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternative motion for summary adjudication is taken off calendar. Defendant did not sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Breckler was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Mr. Breckler¿s deposition testimony precludes defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Plaintiffs represent that they will dismiss their claims for strict products liability, false representation and brake shoe grinding and their request for punitive damages, which are the issues for which defendant sought summary adjudication. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant R.E. Cuddie Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to negligence, loss of consortium and premises owner/contractor liability, granted as to strict liability and off calendar as to false representation and punitive damages. As to negligence, loss of consortium and premises owner/contractor liability, Mr. Breckler¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing tiles removed and installed by defendant. As to strict liability, defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Breckler was exposed to an asbestos-containing product manufactured, sold, supplied or distributed by defendant. Plaintiffs represent that they will dismiss their claims for false representation and punitive damages. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Breckler¿s declaration are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Pacific Scientific Company¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication are denied. Defendant did not sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Breckler was exposed to asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. By not including plaintiffs¿ responses to contention discovery, defendant is unable to successfully invoke the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. The other evidence submitted by defendant is insufficient to satisfy the negate an element prong of Aguilar. Plaintiffs' objection to the declaration of Ms. Stravalle-Schmidt is sustained. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES ROBERT SOPRITO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting D
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ amended motion for reconsideration of order granting defendant Kaiser Ventures, LLC¿s motion for summary adjudication and alternative request for sua sponte reconsideration of order are denied. Plaintiffs failed to meet the requirements of C.C.P. § 1008(a). Plaintiffs did not demonstrate that their motion is based upon new or different facts, circumstances, or law. This is not appropriate case for the court to exercise its discretion to sua sponte reconsider an order. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RORY SNELL VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION, LLD
